<ruby>耶<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">Yē</rt></ruby><ruby>和<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">hé</rt></ruby><ruby>华<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">huá</rt></ruby><ruby>问<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">wèn</rt></ruby><ruby>撒<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">sā</rt></ruby><ruby>但<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">dàn</rt></ruby><ruby>说<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">shuō</rt></ruby>：“<ruby>你<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">Nǐ</rt></ruby><ruby>曾<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">cénɡ</rt></ruby><ruby>用<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">yònɡ</rt></ruby><ruby>心<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">xīn</rt></ruby><ruby>察<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">chá</rt></ruby><ruby>看<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">kàn</rt></ruby><ruby>我<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">wǒ</rt></ruby><ruby>的<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">de</rt></ruby><ruby>仆<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">pú</rt></ruby><ruby>人<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">rén</rt></ruby><ruby>约<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">Yuē</rt></ruby><ruby>伯<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">bó</rt></ruby><ruby>没<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">méi</rt></ruby><ruby>有<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">yǒu</rt></ruby>？<ruby>地<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">Dì</rt></ruby><ruby>上<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">shɑnɡ</rt></ruby><ruby>再<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">zài</rt></ruby><ruby>没<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">méi</rt></ruby><ruby>有<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">yǒu</rt></ruby><ruby>人<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">rén</rt></ruby><ruby>像<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">xiànɡ</rt></ruby><ruby>他<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">tā</rt></ruby><ruby>完<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">wán</rt></ruby><ruby>全<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">quán</rt></ruby><ruby>正<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">zhènɡ</rt></ruby><ruby>直<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">zhí</rt></ruby>，<ruby>敬<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">jìnɡ</rt></ruby><ruby>畏<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">wèi</rt></ruby><ruby>神<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">Shén</rt></ruby>，<ruby>远<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">yuǎn</rt></ruby><ruby>离<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">lí</rt></ruby><ruby>恶<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">è</rt></ruby><ruby>事<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">shì</rt></ruby>。”

<ruby>神<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">Shén</rt></ruby><ruby>说<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">shuō</rt></ruby><ruby>一<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">yí</rt></ruby><ruby>次<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">cì</rt></ruby>、<ruby>两<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">liǎnɡ</rt></ruby><ruby>次<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">cì</rt></ruby>，<ruby>世<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">shì</rt></ruby><ruby>人<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">rén</rt></ruby><ruby>却<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">què</rt></ruby><ruby>不<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">bù</rt></ruby><ruby>理<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">lǐ</rt></ruby><ruby>会<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">huì</rt></ruby>。

<ruby>一<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">Yī</rt></ruby><ruby>千<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">qiān</rt></ruby><ruby>天<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">tiān</rt></ruby><ruby>使<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">shǐ</rt></ruby><ruby>中<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">zhōnɡ</rt></ruby>，<ruby>若<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">ruò</rt></ruby><ruby>有<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">yǒu</rt></ruby><ruby>一<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">yí</rt></ruby><ruby>个<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">ɡè</rt></ruby><ruby>作<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">zuò</rt></ruby><ruby>传<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">chuán</rt></ruby><ruby>话<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">huà</rt></ruby><ruby>的<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">de</rt></ruby><ruby>与<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">yǔ</rt></ruby><ruby>神<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">Shén</rt></ruby><ruby>同<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">tónɡ</rt></ruby><ruby>在<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">zài</rt></ruby>，<ruby>指<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">zhǐ</rt></ruby><ruby>示<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">shì</rt></ruby><ruby>人<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">rén</rt></ruby><ruby>所<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">suǒ</rt></ruby><ruby>当<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">dānɡ</rt></ruby><ruby>行<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">xínɡ</rt></ruby><ruby>的<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">de</rt></ruby><ruby>事<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">shì</rt></ruby>，

论Lùn到dào全quán能nénɡ者zhě，我wǒ们men不bù能nénɡ测cè度duó；他tā大dà有yǒu能nénɡ力lì，有yǒu公ɡōnɡ平pinɡ和hé大dà义yì，必bì不bù苦kǔ待dài人rén。
